name: chatgpt-apps
description: Skills that help developers build ChatGPT Apps and prepare app submission materials from local app and MCP server codebases.

interface.shortDescription: Build ChatGPT Apps and prepare submission materials.
interface.longDescription: A set of Codex skills for building ChatGPT Apps and preparing submission artifacts. Skills can scaffold or refactor Apps SDK projects, inspect local MCP servers, check tool hint annotations against implementation behavior, and generate chatgpt-app-submission.json for the onboard submission form.
defaultPrompt: Build a ChatGPT app from my local MCP server and widget idea.
Generate a ChatGPT Apps submission import file for my MCP server.
Check my MCP tool annotations and submission fields for a ChatGPT Apps review.
